title: P2: gateway heltec overlay has &uart1 nested inside / {} with redundant status=okay after base DTS now enables uart1
description: The overlay syntax puts &uart1 { status = "okay"; }; inside the root / { chosen... ; &uart1... }; block. This is non-standard DTS and now redundant. Should be top-level &uart1 or removed entirely. Also update comment. Treat P2 as real work per codereview policy.
